shared_case_surface: public-safe experience certification gate packets covering clean review-ready, missing authority, missing regression, missing rollback, and recharter-required cases
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the cases only if the replacement preserves the same certification-gate ask class, keeps the bundle inspectable without private release details, and still supports a bounded verdict read that cannot certify the candidate.
public_safe_requirements: candidate evidence remains public-safe or redacted
regression and rollback evidence are visible enough for bounded review
reports never emit certified, codex_certified, or auto_release_approved
